criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: The number and sophistication of AI-driven features such as content recommendation, smart search, personalized user experience, and moderation.
criteria.sources: App Store descriptions, user reviews, tech reviews, developer documentation

criteria.name: User Rating
criteria.description: Average user rating on app stores (e.g., Apple App Store, Google Play Store).
criteria.sources: Apple App Store, Google Play Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads/Installs
criteria.description: The total number of times the app has been downloaded or installed.
criteria.sources: App Store data, third-party app analytics platforms

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Metrics indicating how actively users engage with the app (e.g., daily active users, session length).
criteria.sources: App analytics platforms (e.g., Firebase, Amplitude), developer reports

criteria.name: Privacy Features
criteria.description: Quality of privacy controls and data protection measures.
criteria.sources: App privacy policy, security audits, user reviews

criteria.name: Content Moderation
criteria.description: Effectiveness of AI in moderating content and preventing harmful content.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app guidelines, reports on content moderation effectiveness

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: Level of personalization offered to users through AI algorithms.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app features, developer descriptions

criteria.name: Recommendation Accuracy
criteria.description: Accuracy and relevance of AI-driven recommendations.
criteria.sources: User reviews, A/B testing results, internal metrics

criteria.name: Scalability
criteria.description: The ability of the app to handle a growing number of users and data.
criteria.sources: Developer statements, infrastructure details, performance reports

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: How innovative and unique the AI-powered features are compared to competitors.
criteria.sources: Tech reviews, industry analysis, patent filings
